name: public-agent-plugins
description: Public Claude Code plugins by gnimsys (Marat Akselrod). Includes the Fusion SQL grounding plugin used by the Fusion SQL agent.

plugins.name: fusion-sql
plugins.description: Oracle Fusion Cloud SQL expert. Grounds every table/column/relation against the real Fusion schema via the fusion-schema MCP tools (EBS != Fusion), and asks one clarifying question when the request is ambiguous before emitting SQL.
